params.name: Kojiki
params.description:
On Jan 28, 712 AD, O no Yasumaro completed the compilation of Kojiki.
Kojiki is a Japanese literary work memorized by Hieda no Are and composed by O no Yasumaro at the request of Empress Genmei. It contains the origin of the Japanese archipelago, the kami, and the Japanese imperial line. Kojiki is compiled from Teiki, the records of the emperors, and fundamental records, including myths, legends, and folklore. Among them, the stories of deities are myths, while the heroic deeds are legends; i …
